name: Zyrox Mining International, Inc.
summary: WSPVA Bio Products International, LLC engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of bio-degradable water soluble plastic products in North America. The company's products include plastic bags; clam shells to package fruits/vegetables; hospital gowns and smocks; disposable gloves; plastic bottles; and plastic and shrink wraps. It also licenses its plastic technology. The company is based in Monterey, California.
